name: perplexity-research-plugin
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `perplexity-research`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Deep research using Perplexity Sonar models via AIsa API. Provides synthesized answers with citations. Supports 4 models from fast to exhaustive deep research. Use when: the user needs web search, research, source discovery, or content extraction.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.
